title: CVE-2026-48908: JoomShaper SP Page Builder RCE
summary: [P1] JoomShaper SP Page Builder contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild and there is no patch available. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a critical problem type that affects the application layer.

title: CVE-2026-55255: Langflow Auth Bypass
summary: [P1] Langflow contains an authorization bypass through user-controlled key vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to gain unauthorized access. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild and there is no patch available. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for authorization bypass, which is a critical problem type that affects the application layer.
